hero.title: Shape the Future
hero.description: We design, build, and operate sustainable solutions that shape the future of our cities and environments.

initiatives.heading: Strategic Initiatives
initiatives.subtitle: Focusing our expertise on six key pillars to drive transformation.

preface.heading: Preface
preface.p1: Artificial intelligence is no longer an abstract promise: it is today a reality that is transforming our professions, our working methods, and our ways of innovating. Within the Bouygues Group, this dynamic is particularly tangible. In each of our activities — construction, energy, telecommunications, or media — teams are embracing AI to make it a driver of performance, creativity, and sustainability.
preface.p2: This second edition of our AI Journal, intended to be published twice a year, illustrates the richness and diversity of use cases developed in our subsidiaries. Some aim to optimize daily operations, reduce delays and costs, or improve the quality and safety of our projects. Others open new perspectives in terms of customer relations, decarbonization, or value creation through generative and agentic AI. All share one thing in common: they reflect the desire to act concretely, to experiment, and to deploy high-impact solutions.
preface.p3: Beyond technology, it is a true culture of collective innovation that is expressed. By combining business expertise and data skills, capitalizing on our successes, and stimulating synergies between entities, the Bouygues Group is building a solid trajectory towards the future. This dynamic is based on a strong conviction: AI must serve employees, clients, and society, bringing measurable, responsible, and lasting benefits.
preface.p4: A founding member of the IMPACT AI collective, Bouygues places responsible AI at the heart of this transformation. We are committed to developing ethical, inclusive, and transparent uses, so that innovation benefits everyone and contributes positively to society.
preface.p5: We invite you to explore these use cases as sources of inspiration. They testify to a movement already underway, set to grow, and which positions Bouygues as an actor resolutely focused on the future.

about.welcomeHeading: Welcome to Shape the Future of Infrastructure
about.p1: the Bouygues Group's research platform dedicated to exploring and sharing solutions that will shape the infrastructure of tomorrow.
about.p2: Bringing together all the innovations from the Group's six business lines, this platform embodies a dual cross-functional approach: it promotes the creation of inter-business synergies and identifies truly systemic solutions capable of simultaneously addressing multiple and growing challenges.
about.p3: In a rapidly changing future, where resilience will become an essential requirement, we must rethink how we design, build and operate infrastructure today. This is the prerequisite for being ready to build a sustainable, adaptable and efficient future.
about.p4: As part of this process, three areas have been explored to fuel inspiration and open up new avenues: cities and urban environments, ports and airports. Together, let's discover how these visions come together to transform today's challenges into tomorrow's opportunities.

projects.heroSubtitle: Discover how our solutions are deployed in real-world infrastructure projects globally.

projectDetail.projectBody: This project represents a flagship initiative in our portfolio, demonstrating our commitment to sustainable development and technical excellence. By integrating cutting-edge solutions, we addressed complex infrastructure requirements while adhering to strict environmental standards.
projectDetail.challenge1: Navigating complex regulatory environments and strict environmental compliance standards.
projectDetail.challenge2: Minimizing disruption to existing urban infrastructure and community activities.
projectDetail.benefit1: 30% reduction in operational carbon footprint through optimized material usage.
projectDetail.benefit2: Enhanced connectivity serving over 100,000 daily commuters.
projectDetail.noSolutions: No specific solutions linked to this project.
